  inspection_checklist_id varchar [pk, note: 'Primary key for inspection_checklist']
  parent_inspection_checklist_id varchar [note: 'Self-referencing FK on inspection_checklist (parent_inspection_checklist_id)']
  applicable_shift_types varchar [note: 'Comma-separated list of shift types during which this inspection checklist must be executed, such as day shift, night shift, or all shifts.']
  applicable_site_codes varchar [note: 'Comma-separated list of mine site codes where this inspection checklist is applicable and must be used.']
  approval_authority varchar [note: 'Role or position title of the authority responsible for approving changes to this inspection checklist.']
  approved_by_user varchar [note: 'Username or identifier of the authority who approved this inspection checklist version for operational use.']
  approved_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when this inspection checklist version was formally approved for operational use.']
  archived_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when this inspection checklist was archived and removed from active operational use.']
  checklist_code varchar [note: 'Externally-known unique business identifier for the inspection checklist used across systems and documentation.']
  checklist_description varchar [note: 'Detailed description of the inspection checklist including its objectives, scope, and application context.']
  checklist_name varchar [note: 'Human-readable name of the inspection checklist describing its purpose and scope.']
  checklist_type varchar [note: 'Classification of the inspection checklist by its operational purpose and timing in the asset lifecycle.']
  checklist_version varchar [note: 'Version number of the inspection checklist following semantic versioning to track revisions and updates.']
  created_by_user varchar [note: 'Username or identifier of the user who created this inspection checklist record.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when this inspection checklist record was first created in the system.']
  digital_form_available_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether a digital or mobile-enabled form is available for executing this inspection checklist in the field.']
  effective_from_date date [note: 'Date from which this inspection checklist version becomes valid and mandatory for use in operations.']
  effective_to_date date [note: 'Date until which this inspection checklist version remains valid; nullable for currently active checklists without planned retirement.']
  equipment_category varchar [note: 'Category of mining equipment or asset that this checklist applies to, aligned with fleet and plant classifications.']
  estimated_duration_minutes varchar [note: 'Expected time in minutes required to complete the full inspection checklist under normal conditions.']
  inspection_frequency varchar [note: 'Required frequency at which this inspection checklist must be executed to maintain compliance and operational standards.']
  last_modified_by_user varchar [note: 'Username or identifier of the user who last modified this inspection checklist record.']
  last_modified_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when this inspection checklist record was last modified or updated.']
  last_review_date date [note: 'Date when this inspection checklist was last formally reviewed for accuracy, relevance, and compliance.']
  mandatory_checkpoint_count varchar [note: 'Number of checkpoints within this checklist that are mandatory and must be completed for the inspection to be considered valid.']
  mobile_app_compatible_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether this inspection checklist is compatible with mobile applications used by field operators and maintenance personnel.']
  next_review_date date [note: 'Scheduled date for the next formal review of this inspection checklist to ensure continued relevance and compliance.']
  notes varchar [note: 'Additional notes, comments, or special instructions related to the execution or governance of this inspection checklist.']
  owning_department varchar [note: 'Business department or functional area responsible for maintaining and governing this inspection checklist.']
  pass_threshold_percentage decimal(5,2) [note: 'Minimum percentage of checkpoints that must pass for the overall inspection to be considered successful and the asset to be cleared for operation.']
  photo_evidence_required_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether photographic evidence must be captured and attached during execution of this inspection checklist.']
  regulatory_requirement_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether this inspection checklist is mandated by regulatory or statutory requirements versus being operationally discretionary.']
  required_competency_level varchar [note: 'Minimum competency or qualification level required for personnel authorized to execute this inspection checklist.']
  requires_certification_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether completion of this inspection checklist requires formal certification or sign-off by a qualified inspector or supervisor.']
  review_frequency_months varchar [note: 'Required interval in months between formal reviews of this inspection checklist to maintain governance standards.']
  safety_critical_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether this inspection checklist addresses safety-critical systems or conditions that could result in harm if not properly inspected.']
  source_system varchar [note: 'Operational system of record from which this inspection checklist definition originates or is maintained.']
  status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status of the inspection checklist indicating its availability for operational use.']
  total_checkpoint_count varchar [note: 'Total number of individual inspection checkpoints or items included in this checklist.']

  Note: 'Master reference table for inspection_checklist. Referenced by checklist_id.'
}

Business justification: Maintenance activities (blasting, heavy equipment, road closures) directly impact communities. Mining operations track affected stakeholders for consultation obligations, notification requirements, an']

  capital_project_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to project.capital_project. Business justification: Mining maintenance work orders frequently execute project-driven modifications, upgrades, or commissioning support. Operations track which capital project funded/authorized work orders for cost alloca']

Business justification: Specific maintenance work (rehabilitation, dust suppression upgrades, noise barriers, road improvements) fulfills community commitments from impact assessments or benefit-sharing agreements. Link enab']

Work orders currently denormalize contractor_company; structured FK enables contractor ']
  corrective_action_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to hse.corrective_action. Business justification: HSE corrective actions requiring maintenance execution (install machine guarding, implement engineering controls, modify equipment). Essential for HSE action tracking and closure verification in Minin']

  management_of_change_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to hse.management_of_change. Essential for MOC implementation tracking and pre-startup safety review (PSSR) in Mining operation']

This link enables PM compliance tracking']
  procurement_purchase_order_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to procurement.purchase_order. Mining operations track this link for cost reconciliation, delivery coordination, and budget var']
  programme_of_work_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to tenement.programme_of_work.   project_contract_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to project.project_contract.
